title: Launch Planning in Practice
shortSummary: Build stronger launch planning in practice judgment so product work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Launch Planning in Practice is a leverage point inside product. It supports the broader goal of what to build, what not to build, and how to ship it.
coreConcepts: Launch Planning in Practice needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good launch planning in practice work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Launch Planning in Practice should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
